highlights.summary: SRM School of Public Health admissions 2026 are open. Other latest updates are as follows:

faqs.question: Can I join SRM School of Public Health without entrance for MBA?
faqs.answer: SRM School of Public Health conducts the SRM Joint Entrance Examination for Management to shortlist candidates for admission followed by a Personal Interview. Students with eligible entrance scores in CAT/ SAT/ MAT/ GMAT/ NMAT/ CMAT/ TANCET may also apply. Hence, candidates cannot join SRM School of Public Health without entrance.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for B.Sc at SRM School of Public Health?
faqs.answer:
SRM School of Public Health BSc admissions begin with registration. Candidates must follow the below steps to apply for admission:
STEP 1: Application Process
SRM School of Public Health application forms are available in both online and offline modes. For both modes, candidates are required to fill out the application form available on the official website of the university. Both the processes of application form submission are mentioned below:
Apply Online with E-Payment (fully online process)
Apply Online and pay via DD (partially offline submission)
Candidates are required to visit the official website of the university and follow the below-mentioned steps:
Step 1: Visit the application portal on the University website.
Step 2: Fill out the form online and take a printout of it or download the form and fill it offline.
Step 3: Send the application form to the university campus with a DD of INR 1,200 drawn in the favour of SRMIST, payable at Chennai.
STEP 2: Selection Criteria
SRM School of Public Health conducts the SRM Selection Test. Once the selection process is over, candidates need to pay the SRM School of Public Health BSc fees to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Which courses are offered by SRM School of Public Health?
faqs.answer: SRM School of Public Health offers BSc, MSc, MPH, PhD, Certificate, Short-term, and Training programmes.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for B.Sc at SRM School of Public Health?
faqs.answer: Candidates are required to visit the official website of the university, fill out the form online and take a printout of it or download the form and fill it offline and send the application form to the university campus with a DD of INR 1,200 drawn in the favour of SRMIST, payable at Chennai.

reviews_list.review_title: MPH experience at srm sph.

review_content.Placements: There were around 60 plus students in our batch. Regarding placements, our department plays a vital and supporting role along with mentoring and guiding timely the students for external work world environment. The percentage of students placed at the college was impressive and surely beneficial.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities available at the college are well maintained and utilised to their maximum potential. I can suggest the infrastructure of srm ktr campus as one among the best a student can experience. When talking about sph department, I feel it as a most comforting and academic friendly environment.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Public Health (MPH) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: MPH EXPERIENCE at SRM University.

review_content.Placements: The quality of placements has been exceptional, and college provided us with valuable insight and advice. Overall, I am very satisfied with the placement process at the college and the support provided by the institution. Totally around 60 plus students were there in our batch.
review_content.Infrastructure: My overall experience at the college has been positive and have found the college to have all necessary infrastructure and facilities needed for a good learning environment. Classrooms are equipped with modern technologies and resources that cater the academic needs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Public Health - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: SRM university.

review_content.Placements: SRM is said to be one of the best private institutes in whole of Chennai and the placements provided are very good with around 5-6 Lacs being the avg package. The highest till date is 15 lakh per annum. Internships and training are provided to all the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is quite big with all the things that you may think such as gym, swimming pool, indoor& outdoor courts for basketball, badminton, tennis, etc. There are many hostels with different accommodation capacities and the mess food is also very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Health Inspector - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Placements are pretty good.

review_content.Placements: I will be placed in 2022 July. There are 2 more months for getting placed for my batch 2019-2023. The highest package for my seniors was 42 LPA. The lowest package was 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Google, Infosys, Wipro, and TCS.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure is available for both students as well as lecturers. The hostel facility is somewhat good but also we should think about expenditure. Hostel costs are too high. The hostel also provides a gym facility for boys, we have to pay an extra 5000 for the gym.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Public Health - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college and placements are good for 2019.

review_content.Placements: Public health, our course offers students to involve in the health-conscious awareness of the community. Make people aware of the disease and its prevention. This includes the levels of prevention of diseases which includes the vaccination and the things. Around 80% of students are placed. The average salary package offered is 4 LPA. Companies like Multilevel hospitals and around 70% of students get internships, and roles as a health inspector and such things are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is a good course which includes the community level course. Facilities include, that has an individual hospital for students to practice courses. It provides Wi-Fi with air-conditioner classrooms, and a library with 5000 books. It has a big canteen with a madras cafe franchise in it, with a big indoor and outdoor playground in it.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Students can study from here, and they can get everything.

review_content.Placements: SRM University is the best university in all over Tamil Nadu. Approximately 40% of the students are studying PhD in our college. The highest salary package offered is 4 to 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2 to 3 LPA. Many top recruiting companies offer better career options.
review_content.Infrastructure: Various types of facilities and infrastructure are available, like Wi-Fi, labs and different types of classrooms. Mainly the library is awesome where we find different types of books. Our college atmosphere is also very friendly, and we can feel very safe.

admission_overview.college_name: School of Public Health SRM Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

admission_process.title: SRM School of Public Health Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SRM School of Public Health admissions are based on SRM Selection Test for all courses. SRM selection test is a centralised university-level test conducted by SRM University for all of its four campuses in India. The school imparts quality education in the public health domain at par with international standards. The flagship programme of SRM School of Public Health is MPH (Masters of Public Health) which is a two-year duration course.

SRM School of Public Health offers many UG, PG, doctoral, certificate, and short term courses in the Public Health field. Students are selected for various courses on the basis of marks in the SRM selection test. The table below gives a brief about SRM School of Public Health courses, admission criteria, and course fee:
Course Name
Common Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Graduates from all streams with a minimum of 60% aggregate
SRM selection test + Interview + Academic merit
SRM selection test + Interview + Academic merit
Two years of Master’s degree or a professional degree with at least 55% aggregate
SRM selection test/UGC NET/ SLET/GATE+ Interview
SRM School of Public Health admissions begin with registration via online mode. Candidates must follow the below steps to apply for admission:
STEP 1: SRM School of Public Health Application Process 2025

SRM School of Public Health offers application forms are available in both online and offline modes. For both modes, candidates are required to fill the application form available on the official website of the University campus.
STEP 2: Selection
SRM School of Public Health conducts SRM Selection Test to shortlist candidates for admission to PG courses. For PhD, aspirants can also get admission based on their score in UGC-NET/ SLET or GATE.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the selection process is over, candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Government Polytechnic College, Hyderabad Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

faqs.answer: A:    The fees structure for programs offerred by the Government Polytechnic College, Hyderabad is INR 6000 - INR 7600.
faqs.question: What is the current fee structure for courses at Government Polytechnic College, Hyderabad?

reviews_list.review_title: Good college for polytechnic education.

review_content.Placements: In civil engineering at the Government Polytechnic Hyderabad, around 75% got placed. The highest package was nearly 4 LPA, the lowest 1.5 LPA, and the average 2.2–2.5 LPA. Recruiters included L&T, Nagarjuna Construction, Shapoorji Pallonji, and local contractors. About 50% got internships in government departments & firms. Roles: site engineer, junior engineer, trainee.
review_content.Infrastructure: As a backbencher in Government Polytechnic Hyderabad (Civil), the facilities were decent but not top-class. Labs for surveying, concrete, and CAD were useful, though some equipment felt outdated. Wi-Fi was patchy. Classrooms were average with fans and boards. The library had enough reference books. The hostel was basic, with small rooms and shared washrooms. Mess food was just manageable. The canteen snacks were better. Medical help was limited to a small dispensary. Sports like cricket, volleyball, kho-kho, kabaddi, badminton, etc. Inter Polytechnic sports and games are conducted every year.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely disappointed because of the infrastructure and placements.

review_content.Placements: Fewer students get placement in college because our college is a polytechnic college. All students go to further education, so they don't look for placements, but it's a top college in Telangana. The education is top-notch. Not all the faculty are so nice, but it is the best college in Telangana.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is a little bit old and has some infrastructure issues, an old model design, and the campus is not so well-maintained. The food is not so good, but the teaching is good. In our college, the infrastructure is so bad, but the placement and teaching are all good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: College has basic facilities, average faculty, placements, and needs upgrades for better learning.

review_content.Placements: First thing is that everyone prefers preparing for ECET exam, and placements are average with around 50-60% of CSE students getting jobs. The highest package is about 3 LPA to 4 LPA. Around 30-40% of students also get internships in local IT companies, mostly in trainee or support roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our department has basic facilities like labs, classrooms, and a library. Labs are fine for practical work but many computers need fixing and upgrades to work smoothly. Wi-Fi is available, though it often disconnects and is not stable. Overall, the facilities are decent for learning but need several improvements to match today's needs and give students better practical exposure.

individual_reviews.title: It's very difficult to advise, but if you get this college, you'll definitely find a good network.

content.Placements: 60 members are placed in our course. The highest package offered is 10 LPA. Government and central government jobs are offered and preferred. 95 percent will get internships. Industrial training, cybersecurity and chip designer roles are offered through the course that you chose.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of classroom is better but the hostel is somewhat worse than the college. There is a library and a network hub for the computers but they are never used. The quality of food in our hostel is good, but not much. Medical facilities are provided in the PHC, and sports and games are regular for us.

individual_reviews.title: We are absolutely dissatisfied with our college.

content.Infrastructure: The faculty approaches so many ways that they can't tell how to teach, and the quality of the food is very bad in our hostel. The food available in my mistake and canteen is so bad, and there are no medical facilities, and there are no sports and games, but please, they will say to play on children’s day.

reviews.review_text: I don't think we have good infrastructure; literally, there are very old computers, and for libraries, there will be very few. There will be Wi-Fi for only some computers. Most of them are a waste. The quality of hostels is very bad, and I don't want to think about food because it is very disgusting. There are no medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: This is very average college. On my first year, it is good.
reviews.review_text: I don't think that our college has the best infrastructure because it has been built over many years. There are only some rooms where we have to sit comfortably and listen to class because there is not enough space to sit and listen comfortably. My hostels are so much bad. There are no good rooms. The food price is not good. The food will not be cooked, and curry is very disgusting.

reviews.review_heading: Top 1 college in Telangana state, but it looks like an old building.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure facilities are not good, because the lab equipment is not enough for the students, and some of the electronic circuits in labs are not functioning properly or are not working as the circuits are old. The facilities in hostel are not so good because of food in mess, which was the main reason in hostel, and the surroundings.

reviews.review_heading: Top 1 college, all over Telangana state, but it looks old.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good in terms of atmospheric conditions, security guards, and CCTV cameras are present everywhere in the college surroundings, but labs, and libraries are bad because of insufficient funds from government. Hostel premises are the worst because of poor quality of food and limited items, and atmospheric conditions are noisy because of traffic beside the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Top1 college in Telangana state, gaining knowledge through technical issues.
reviews.review_text: The guards and CCTV cameras are available in the college every. The campus covers 15 acres of land, and there is no ragging or any kind of harassment or discrimination among the students. If it is done, students should be rusticated, a stocked library present, and labs should be innovative to learn. Poor quality of food items with limited premises is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Polytechnic College in Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is excellent and beautiful, with greenery everywhere. The facilities available in the college and course are a playground, canteen, auditorium, virtual classrooms, NCC, NSS, scholarship cell, etc. There is a good government hostel for boys and girls at a lower cost. As I am a day scholar, I do not know much about the hostel.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied from the college because of really good campus facilities and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: AIIMS provides no placement. They just provide us a UG degree. However, we have many opportunities after a UG degree, including MD/MS, Non-Acad JR, UPSC CMS, Medical Officer, etc. As for my plan, I have thought of doing Derma MS or UPSC CMS. However, my plan may change as I further proceed in this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has many restrictions. The library is not properly functional. Wi-Fi is available across the whole campus. Labs are well-equipped. Classrooms are designed very well. AIIMS Bilaspur has compulsory hostels for every MBBS student. The hostel fee is only 100 rupees, and it is already included in the 5856/-. There are 2 messes in AIIMS and many food stalls. However, the mess is also compulsory for MBBS students. The food quality is okay, which is common in every college as students always miss their home food. As the hostel is compulsory, we cannot rent a PG or room unless we are suspended. The affordability of the hostel is very good. We have double-sharing rooms, including 1 bed, 1 study table and chair, and 1 almirah, with shared common bathrooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied.

review_content.Placements: So I am a B.Sc. paramedical MLT student of AIIMS Bilaspur 2023 batch. So there is a total of 16 seats at MLT which we are 10 boys and 2 girls are pursuing. Salary is around Rs. 35,000 to Rs. 50,000 per month. There is no recruiting company we can work with within a hospital. 100% of students got the internships. Top roles are like in MLT we have to work as an all-rounder. We assist in pathology lab, microbiology lab, and biochemistry lab.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are damn amazing. We got a room in which we had a roommate, table, chair, almirah, and everything. 24-hour electricity and water service is provided. Wi-Fi is also available. Mess food is good but not excellent. We have a sports week every month and intercollege cricket, football, and basketball competitions are conducted.

description: AIIMS, Bilaspur cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

AIIMS, Bilaspur NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 6483 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

AIIMS, Bilaspur MBBS cutoff 2025 was 6483 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 3549 for admission to the MBBS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

AIIMS, Bilaspur accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
AIIMS, Bilaspur INI CET cutoff 2026 has been released for the postgraduate courses MD, etc. At Round 3, the closing ranks ranged from 124 to 16575 for students in the General AI quota.

Considering the ranks, the most competitive for admission was MD in General Medicine, with a lowest cutoff rank of 124. On the otherhand, the least competitive was MD in Forensic Medicine, with INI CET 2026 cutoff rank of for admission in the General category.

In the table below, candidates can find the INI CET round- and category-wise cut-off details for admission to various PG medical courses. For General AI category students, the top three most competitive courses for admission were MD in General Medicine, MD in Obstetrics and Gynaecology and MD in Anaesthesiology, with Round 3 closing ranks of 124, 1060 and 1344, respectively.

INI CET counselling is conducted in four rounds: mock round, first round, second round, and open round. All the rounds of counselling are conducted online. Candidates appearing for admission via INI CET can refer to the table provided below to view or download the round and year-wise INI CET cutoff lists.
AIIMS, Bilaspur B.Sc. cutoff 2025 was 1844 in the last round. In 2024, the last round closing rank for the same course was 889 for the students belonging to the General AI quota.
For the OBC category students, the AIIMS Nursing cutoff 2025 for the B.Sc. course was 1938 in the last round. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

The AIIMS, Bilaspur cutoff 2025 has been released based on the AIIMS Paramedical exam. The cutoff was released for different categories such as General, OBC, SC, ST and EWS categories belonging to the All India quota. The cutoff range among the General AI category was between 75 and 567.

overview_faqs.question: What is the MA tuition fee at NBU?
overview_faqs.answer: The tuition fee to be paid for an MA at NBU varies with every specialisation available. The tuition fee for the MA course at NBU ranges from INR 375 - INR 3.4 lakh. However, it includes only the amount paid to college and is calculated as per first year. The actual amount may vary. The above fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is indicative and hence still liable to change. The fee structure at NBU is such that the education imparted is highly affordable.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee structure for LLM programme at NBU?
overview_faqs.answer: North Bengal University's fee structure is inclusive of different components that are either one-time chargeable or have to be paid annually/semesterly. Some of these components are tuition fees, caution deposits, hostel fees, and more. The tuition fee for the LLM courses is INR 5,300, and the one-time fee is INR 1,020. Moreover, the mentioned fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee structure for BA LLB (H) programme at NBU?
overview_faqs.answer: NBU fee structure compares various components, that are either one-time chargeable or have paid annually/semesterly. Some of these components include, such as tuition fees, hostel fees, caution deposits, etc. Additionally, the NBU BA LLB (Hons) tuition fee is INR 16,000. However, the mentioned fee is sourced from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is inductive.

review_summary.college_name: University of North Bengal Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Nani Bhattacharya Smarak Mahavidyalaya has a very good collection, especially for arts students.

content.Placements: I am Hasrat Ansari, and an ex-student of Nani Bhattacharya Smarak Mahavidyalaya. In 2022, I started my first year of college with many other students. My course is B.A. In my college, there are no extra fees except for the exam and registration. There, I met the best teachers of art. They are really good and sweet and always help students. In my batch, we have almost 30 percent of students placed from college. The total package is a minimum of Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 15,000 for the B.A. course.
content.Infrastructure: As we are all arts students, we get some facilities like a library and some facilities for other honours, like a lab and a testing room. For sports, we also have a club where we have many assets to play and practice. In our college, we have a canteen in good condition and very clean, and the food items are very healthy and tasty. Our college is very disciplined and clean, and we maintain hygiene.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A. Hons.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: One of the best overall colleges in the mountains.

content.Placements: The general number of individual placements is high, but the college does not provide direct placement facilities. Although students have a good chance of being selected by multiple companies, the college itself is not directly involved in organizing placements.
content.Infrastructure: There is a lack of lab infrastructure in the Geography department. Although it is one of the best departments in the college. Other science-related departments have better labs and infrastructure. The hostel facilities for girls are better since there are no hostels for boys. But the girls' hostels are better and provide decent food and structure.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A. Hons.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: All about my experience in Mathabhanga College.

content.Placements: If a student get 50% number in HS, they can get a seat in my college. Now, in new semester system, if a student can get 45% in their HS they can get seat in my college through online. There is no placement system in this college, but if a student scored good results then they can get a seat in various universities, even in JNU.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi available in our campus, labs for scientific research, a library where there are so many books available, and a digital classroom. Although I don't stay in hostel, there are 2 hostels in this college, one for boys and one for girls.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL. B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Decent placements and affordable fees.

content.Placements: NBU placement cell facilitates jobs in companies like TCS, Cognizant, and HDFC Bank, with a 40-60% placement rate. Placement support is stronger for professional courses like MBA AND BCA but limited for traditional courses like B.Sc. WITH some BCA roles reaching INR 12 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: NBU 330 ACRES campus features modern classrooms, a well stocked library with 2,23,208 books, and advanced labs for Science and technology. Facilities include wi-fi, a computer center, sports complexes, and auditoriums, though some areas need better maintenance.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Business Administration - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: An average college for studies, satisfied with the faculty and placements.

content.Placements: Percentage of students placed in my course is approximately 45%. The highest package is ₹15k per month, the average ₹9k per month, and the lowest ₹5k per month. Top recruiters included Indian Bank. Around 60% of students got internships. Companies that offered internships include ICICI Bank, Punjab National Bank, SBI, and Shaping Ideas.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the department are very good. The classrooms are well-organized and equipped with a smart board, speakers, microphones, and Wi-Fi. The library is open to all departments and contains all the necessary books. Hostel facilities are not available, and the food in the canteen is average.

admission_overview.college_name: University of North Bengal Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection Process & Dates

paragraphs: North Bengal University admission process 2025is based onmeritfor UG courses while for PG courses admission is granted on the basis ofwritten test and viva. NBU doctoral-level programmes accept a valid score in the NBU entrance exam and personal interview process for admission. The mode of application at NBU is online.

University of North Bengal(NBU) offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programmes under its 30+ departments, housed under two faculties. It offers courses in various fields includingScience,Commerce, andArtsetc. The university also offers a diploma course and a range of courses under the Directorate of Distance Education.

Located in Siliguri, West Bengal, North Bengal University offers more than400 coursesin various specialisations includingMicrobiology, Law, Mathematics,Economics, Sociology,Mass Communicationetc. These courses are delivered by the excellent faculties of the university. Check out theNBU admission highlights 2025details below:
Particulars
NBU AdmissionHighlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Distance/Online
Application status 2024
Fee range across the courses
Programmes Offered
27 (404 courses)
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
MCA | MBA | BSc

The basic eligibility for admission at the University of North Bengal is merit in the last qualifying examination. Candidates who have met the basic eligibility can apply for the desired course. The selection of candidates for several courses is done on a merit basis, for others, the scores of national, state, or university-level entrance exams are considered. The table below lists the popular NBU courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

The multiple components included in NBU fees are tuition fees,security deposit,hostel feesmess feesetc. The one-time charges, such as library security deposit, grade card, and more have to be paid once at the time of admission.The courses at various levels at North Bengal University are provided at different course fees and a different number of seats are offered for the courses. Check out the table below to learn more:
Tuition Fees (Investment)
INR 1.60 lakh
BA LLB (Hons)
INR 480 – INR 3,360
Note: Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change.

NBU admission process is completely online. Before applying, candidates are required to meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Selection process varies course to course. For PG courses, candidates must appear for entrance examinations, such as CAT, MAT etc. Below are the step by step process for NBU admission:
Step 1: NBU Application Process 2025:Visit the official website @nbu.ac.inand apply

Step 2: Selection:Selection is done on the basis of merit list/ written test/ entrance exam. Admission to the MBA requires a valid score in CMAT/ MAT/CAT/ ATMA/ JMET/XAT/ NBU-MAT, followed by GD and PI. MA, MSc, MCA and LLM admissions are offered on the basis of a written test followed by a viva-voce conducted by the university
Step 3: Payment of Fee:Candidates are required to pay the admission fee for their desired course to secure a seat at NBU.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by NBU for MCA admission?
faqs.answer: NBU offers MCA courses for a duration of two-years. For MCA admission, NBU accepts the candidates on the basis of WB JECA entrance exam.  The West Bengal Joint Entrance Exam for Computer Application, commonly known as WB JECA is the exam for admission toMCAcourses. The West Bengal Joint Entrance Examinations Board (WBJEEB) conducts the WBJECA every year for admission in the colleges of West Bengal.

faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for the BA programme in NBU?
faqs.answer: The tuition fee to be paid for a BA at NBU varies with every specialisation available. The tuition fee for the BA course at NBU ranges fromINR 300 - INR 1.2 lakh. However, it includes only the amount paid to college and is calculated as per first year. Actual amount may vary. The above fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is indicative and hence still liable to change. The fee structure at NBU is such that the education imparted is highly affordable.

faqs.question: Is it hard to get admission to NBU?
faqs.answer: North Bengal University admission to a majority of undergraduate and postgraduate courses is based on marks scored in the last qualifying exam followed by a personal interview (PI) round. Candidates who fulfil the eligibility criteria can get admission at NBU. Selection of the candidates is only based on academic performance. Upon selection, candidates need to submit the required documents for the verification process.

placement_report.college_name: University of North Bengal Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: NBU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per North Bengal University NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 5-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 1.8 LPA and INR 3 LPA , respectively. Earlier, according to the NIRF report 2023, a total of 73 UG and PG students were placed during North Bengal University placements 2022 . The median package offered to UG (5-year) and PG (2-year) students was INR 60,000 and INR 3.27 LPA during North Bengal University placements 2022, respectively . However, the university recorded nearly 42% hiring rate for UG (5-year) students during placements 2022.
The university has not released the official placement report for the year 2023. However, the NIRF report is available. Candidates can check the link below:
North Bengal University NIRF report 2023

faqs.question: Does North Bengal University have better placements than Siliguri Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: North Bengal University: The median package offered to UG (5-year) and PG (2-year) students was INR 60,000 and INR 3.27 LPA during North Bengal University placements The university offers various courses, and the recruiters at North Bengal University placements 2023 were from various sectors such as education, research, and administration Siliguri Institute of Technology: The institute provides good placements, and almost 40% of students got placed in the civil, mechanical, and electrical engineering divisions The highest salary package offered was 13 LPA, and the average salary package offered varies between 4-5 LPA.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at North Bengal University?
faqs.answer: Bengal Institute of Business Studies is one of the best MBA colleges in Kolkata that provides 100% placement guarantee to its students. Many esteemed MNCs like Aditya Birla, Google, Reliance, Dabur, and 400+ companies visit the campus for Recruitment. BIBS is the only MBA College in Kolkata that gives you corporate exposure and endless networking opportunities that give you an edge over others.

highlights.description: NBU is one of India’s top institutes. It is ranked #51-100 by the NIRF 2025 under the State Public University category. institute is well-known for its well-structured academic curriculum, excellent faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The NBU rankings have been explained in the article below:

nirf.description:
NBU has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'State Public University' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, NBU's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.

NBU has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by QS World University Rankings 2026, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Nani Bhattacharya Smarak MahavidyalayaReviewed on 25 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Nani Bhattacharya Smarak Mahavidyalaya has a very good collection, especially for arts students.
reviews.review_text: As we are all arts students, we get some facilities like a library and some facilities for other honours, like a lab and a testing room. For sports, we also have a club where we have many assets to play and practice. In our college, we have a canteen in good condition and very clean, and the food items are very healthy and tasty. Our college is very disciplined and clean, and we maintain hygiene.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Darjeeling Government CollegeReviewed on 19 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: One of the best overall colleges in the mountains.
reviews.review_text: There is a lack of lab infrastructure in the Geography department. Although it is one of the best departments in the college. Other science-related departments have better labs and infrastructure. The hostel facilities for girls are better since there are no hostels for boys. But the girls' hostels are better and provide decent food and structure.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Mathabhanga CollegeReviewed on 15 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: All about my experience in Mathabhanga College.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi available in our campus, labs for scientific research, a library where there are so many books available, and a digital classroom. Although I don't stay in hostel, there are 2 hostels in this college, one for boys and one for girls.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placements and affordable fees.
reviews.review_text: NBU 330 ACRES campus features modern classrooms, a well stocked library with 2,23,208 books, and advanced labs for Science and technology. Facilities include wi-fi, a computer center, sports complexes, and auditoriums, though some areas need better maintenance.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Salesian CollegeReviewed on 17 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: An average college for studies, satisfied with the faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the department are very good. The classrooms are well-organized and equipped with a smart board, speakers, microphones, and Wi-Fi. The library is open to all departments and contains all the necessary books. Hostel facilities are not available, and the food in the canteen is average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Islampur CollegeReviewed on 17 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Affordable education with supportive faculty, needs more practical exposure and events.
reviews.review_text: Islampur College offers decent infrastructure with Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, a well-stocked library, and basic computer labs for practical sessions. Hostel facilities are limited, however, private hostels are nearby. The canteen serves simple food, medical aid is basic, and students enjoy sports like football and cricket.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Ananda Chandra CollegeReviewed on 10 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is an average college with room for improvement.
reviews.review_text: The college offers well-maintained and clean infrastructure, making it a good environment for personal and academic development. Classrooms have seating and a blackboard, but not all classes have projectors or Wi-Fi for smart classes. Laboratories are equipped with basic technologies but lack modern equipment. Sports ground and the indoor stadium should go under maintenance. The hostel facilities are also average. One room is shared by 3 students, but the main problem in the hostel is that it ha...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Siliguri CollegeReviewed on 1 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Siliguri College is one of the best colleges in Siliguri/North Bengal.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, and classrooms are very clean with comfortable benches. The library is full of many books. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is very good. The canteen is very clean and neat. Medical facilities are also available. Sports and games are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Parimal Mitra Smriti MahavidyalayaReviewed on 23 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Mostly yes, I am satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are okay, average. The infrastructure is well developed. The library is well organised and good. Canteen food is well and tasty, and provides every kind of dish. Sports and games are played often, and students are offered to participate in state-level games. Technical and lab facilities are offered.

reviews.review_heading: CIS means no job, freedom, and loss.
reviews.review_text: The department provides Wi-Fi, but the speed is slow. The classrooms are okay, but no AC and the fans are very slow speed. The library is very bad, with no books available every time. There are no hostels provided for the BCA course, no canteen, no medical facility, and no sports or games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Darjeeling Government CollegeReviewed on 26 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Innovative learning with boundless opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and the facilities at Darjeeling Government College were of exceptional quality and designed to provide students with a world wide learning environment. Library was well-stocked with academic and research materials. Hostels were good and focused on hygiene. Mess food quality was reasonably good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Darjeeling Government CollegeReviewed on 19 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Memorable days in college.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure like smart room or smart class you can say. Central library is there in our college. Labs for chemistry depth students and many instruments like dumpy level theodolite are there. There is only girls hostel just behind the college very near like 10 meters distance backside.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Acharya Prafulla Chandra Roy  Government CollegeReviewed on 22 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: APCRG College is a very helpful and good college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-F, labs, classrooms, and a central library are available in our college. A departmental library is available in our department.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Kalipada Ghosh Tarai MahavidyalayaReviewed on 22 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the worst government college in Siliguri.
reviews.review_text: There is no good infrastructure. There are no labs for practicals and we will get the basic library facility. There is no mess or cafeteria or any hostel food facility. It has sports and games like cricket, football, and volleyball. Classrooms are filled only during exam times and no students are interested in being in regular classes.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Acharya Prafulla Chandra Roy  Government CollegeReviewed on 22 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Maximal deals excel in commutative brings with unity.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we don't have any hostel system or something like that. But we have menu faculty members in our college like central library, college union, sports union, etc. We have a clean cafeteria. The food is good enough for the students and professors.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement in medical college. However, the college does provide a 12-month internship in an ayurvedic hospital. The internship is divided into two six-month periods. During the first six months, the intern rotates through various departments, such as panchakrma. During the second six months, the intern is assigned to a medical college hospital or other primary health care facility.

The college provides hostel facilities for both girls and boys, with an annual fee of Rs. 12,000. The mess facility is available for boys.

faqs.answer: A:    Combined intake across all courses at Dr. Chandramma Dayananda Sagar Institute of Medical Education and Research is up to 150. Dr. Chandramma Dayananda Sagar Institute of Medical Education and Research offers MPH, B.Sc, MBBS courses for students to build their careers in Medicine & Health Sciences. These highly regarded programs are available in full-time mode, catering to the needs of students who wish to obtain a comprehensive education in this field.
faqs.question: What's the seat availability for courses at the Dr. Chandramma Dayananda Sagar Institute of Medical Education and Research?

reviews_list.review_title: It is a wonderful university.

review_content.Placements: We are the fourth batch of our course, so we still don't know about placements. I'm a medical imaging and traditional technology (MIRT) student. I've heard from my teachers, seniors, and my counselor, I think I'm in a good place and will have good placement opportunities after the completion of my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious, well-lit, and ventilated with projectors. There are subject-specific labs with learning management systems and with a modern view hostel. The mess provides hygienic and nutritious food. There are even common rooms for both boys and girls.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: I'm very satisfied with this college from every point of view.

review_content.Placements: To be honest, there is no pass out till now from our college. By the end of the academic year, there will be a 1st pass-out batch. I asked seniors about internships. They are doing well with sufficient money. I'm a 1st-year MBBS student, and I think this college will improve more than any college in Karnataka and have a very good reputation in the coming years. Our course is going very well, & teachers are very good in their professions to teach every topic understandably.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are too good, and I think no other colleges in Karnataka have this much-facilitated classrooms. There is an A. C. switchboard to each bench and a well-sized teaching stage. Wi-Fi is there anytime, but I don't know the Wi-Fi password. For the library, I will give 5 stars because it has mind-blowing interior design, which makes us read peacefully. The cafeteria is there, and I will give it 3 stars for it. Because there is no internet access. Hostels are too good, but yearly rent is quite a bit more. For sports & games, this college is best because there are huge grounds for each sport. The hostel mess is quite crowded, and the food is moderate. Medical facilities are also there.

individual_reviews.title: College has good infrastructure, experienced faculty, and a convenient location.

content.Placements: At Anastasia Technologies, lecturers explain that after graduation, we can work in various roles in the healthcare sector, including OT (operation theaters), wards, ICUs, and research areas. Nowadays, the demand for professionals in allied health sciences has increased, making this course a great choice for a promising career.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is good, but the food is not satisfactory and quite expensive. Students who want a true campus experience can stay in the college hostel. Otherwise, there are many affordable and better options nearby, such as apartments and PG accommodations.

individual_reviews.title: It is a wonderful university.

content.Placements: We are the fourth batch of our course, so we still don't know about placements. I'm a medical imaging and traditional technology (MIRT) student. I've heard from my teachers, seniors, and my counselor, I think I'm in a good place and will have good placement opportunities after the completion of my course.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious, well-lit, and ventilated with projectors. There are subject-specific labs with learning management systems and with a modern view hostel. The mess provides hygienic and nutritious food. There are even common rooms for both boys and girls.

Our course is going very well, & teachers are very good in their professions to teach every topic understandably.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of administration.

review_content.Placements: Currently the first batch from the college is doing their internship and basically there is no campus placements/recruitment for medical graduates unlike in engineering. In The first passing out batch, almost 95% has got internship in our college hospital. But there is no stephen money given. They are making to work them for free.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilites of hostel, mess, sports mentioned in college website or brochure is all lacking in real. The hostel structure is good with regular cleaning, but there is no proper other facilities like gym, indoor games, TV room, doesn't allow outside food into hostel. The mess food is somewhat okay but not upto the mark. The infrastructure of academic building (classroom) is equipped with good tables, chair, projector, computer, but the classrooms are long (in length), which makes visibility of screen inappropriate. The library is equipped with different books, but doesn't allow to carry books out of library, and even only 1-2 books is limited to a person.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely a satisfactory college but lacks patients and has poor hostel facilities.

review_content.Placements: MBBS offers one of the highest-paid jobs, and now, India lacks doctors. So, the placements are not a problem for medical students, wherever they go, they will get the job. Kanachur Institute of Medical Sciences is one of the top medical colleges in Karnataka, so you will get a highly-paid job.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are a little good, but the hostels are the worst. They will charge a huge amount from you, but they don't even give basic facilities like cooler or AC, and all rooms are triple-shared, so you can't even think about privacy and a good study environment.

Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. Kanachur Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Centre is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Kanachur Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Centre has received an impressive review rating of 3.88 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 3.5 for Campus Life, 4 for Placements, 4.3 for Faculty, and 3.8 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Kanachur Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Centre Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college and teaching and also best infrastructure.

content.Placements: There are nearly 150 students our batch. As this is a medical college there are no packages and placements. We can apply for a hospital after the course. Almost all do internship in this college itself and almost all the students will become doctors.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decent enough with all the facilities needed by the students. Hostel is good enough and also has the best facilities like wardrobe, attached bathrooms, beds, etc. Food is given of good quality. Menu is chosen by seniors. There are also very less games to play in our campus.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It's a good college but still needs to improve.

content.Placements: Placement is not provided in medical colleges, But doing an internship here is not that worth, it because they aren't going to pay fan or internship now NMC has decided to pay interns now I'm in 1st year so by the time I'll be an intern I think they will pay.
content.Infrastructure: Good classrooms, Good facilities especially the Anatomy department, Good Library, Hostel, Canteen, and Mess, our hostel is good 24 hours electricity, but no Wi-Fi, bathroom, the washroom is well maintained, and the hostel has restricted timing within 6 PM you should be on campus.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of administration.

content.Placements: Currently the first batch from the college is doing their internship and basically there is no campus placements/recruitment for medical graduates unlike in engineering. In The first passing out batch, almost 95% has got internship in our college hospital. But there is no stephen money given. They are making to work them for free.
content.Infrastructure: The facilites of hostel, mess, sports mentioned in college website or brochure is all lacking in real. The hostel structure is good with regular cleaning, but there is no proper other facilities like gym, indoor games, TV room, doesn't allow outside food into hostel. The mess food is somewhat okay but not upto the mark. The infrastructure of academic building (classroom) is equipped with good tables, chair, projector, computer, but the classrooms are long (in length), which makes visibility of screen inappropriate. The library is equipped with different books, but doesn't allow to carry books out of library, and even only 1-2 books is limited to a person.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely a satisfactory college but lacks patients and has poor hostel facilities.

content.Placements: MBBS offers one of the highest-paid jobs, and now, India lacks doctors. So, the placements are not a problem for medical students, wherever they go, they will get the job. Kanachur Institute of Medical Sciences is one of the top medical colleges in Karnataka, so you will get a highly-paid job.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are a little good, but the hostels are the worst. They will charge a huge amount from you, but they don't even give basic facilities like cooler or AC, and all rooms are triple-shared, so you can't even think about privacy and a good study environment.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good teaching with dedicated faculty, good in infrastructure are able to provide maximum facilities.

content.Placements: As it is a college of medicine, here no placements are done and no company comes for recruiting students. In the college of Medicine, there is a mandatory internship of 1 Year for all the students pursuing MBBS. In my course, doctors especially general physician are there.
content.Infrastructure: There are total 4 Lecture Halls, 1 Central Library, Each department Has 2 Labs. Hostel rooms are spacious with attached bathroom, hostel also has a gym, recreation and sports room. Various sports tournaments happen at a gap of 2 months. Mess food is good compared to other colleges.

table.details: 88V7+7GP, AHTC Rd, (Near Chilukuri Balaji temple) Himayatnagar, Telangana
BTech, BSc, BBA, MBA, MTech, PhD

college_info.intro:
Chaitanya University offers three-year BBA, BSc, BA, and other courses to students at the undergraduate level. Moreover, at the postgraduate level, Chaitanya University offers one to two-year MA and MSc, MBA courses to students. The university also offers PhD courses to students.
The flagship programme offered at Chaitanya University is the BTech. The institute provides this programme to students at the UG level. The university offers the BTech programme for a duration of 4 years with a comprehensive curriculum. Chaitanya University courses strive to enhance students' learning experience to prepare them for the industry. Below mentioned are some of the courses, along with Chaitanya University fees and their respective eligibility:

faqs.answer: A:    To get into Chaitanya University for an MBA course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Students must pass graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserve category). Chaitanya University offers full-time MBA courses of two years' duration. Students can get into this course based on entrance-exam. Apart from the selection criteria, students must pass graduation (common eligibility).
faqs.question: How much percentage is required for admission to MBA at Chaitanya University?

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to the MBA course at Chaitanya University, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The selection criteria for this course is entrance-based i.e., TSICET/Other State Entrance Tests recognised by UGC/Eligibility Test through our At-Home-Exam/Chaitanya Entrance Test (CET) and candidates must pass graduation. The duration of the course is two years spread over four semesters.
faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to MBA course at Chaitanya University?

faqs.answer: A:    For admission in a BPharma programme at Chaitanya University, it is crucial that the aspirant fulfills the course-specific eligibility criteria. Thus, only the aspirants who have passed Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate are eligible for admission. In addition, student should have passed the qualifying examination from a recognised board. Candidate must also hold the Class 12 mark sheet during application form filling and at the time of admission for verification purposes.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements and teaching skills.

review_content.Placements: Good planting of the future in any student masters degree. The lowest package is 15k, and the highest package is 50k. 50 percent of students are placed in schools and colleges. 10 colleges and 15 schools offered the job of engineering in our institute. There are only two top-brand schools available.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good books are available in library and other general knowledge books are available in the library. Hostel beds per person are there in multiple rooms, with 4 ceiling fans for each room. Wi-Fi classrooms and digital classes are there. The college playground has multiple games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The best college with good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Our college has the best placement, with the highest package of 20 LPA and an average of 7 LPA. Our college is deemed to be a university where big companies like Flipkart, Google, and Microsoft visit. Most of the students are offered an AICTE partner internship in the first year itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is well established with good infrastructure and Wi-Fi facilities all over the campus. Our college also has a hostel facility with the best food and 2, 3, and 4 shared room options. We have a canteen facility in our college where faculty also visit during their breaks, and the food is also good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Chaitanya deemed to be a university is a good college.

content.Placements: 50 percent of students are receiving recruitment right now, with an average package of 3 LPA, from companies like TCS, Tech Mahindra, Kotak, etc. 50 percent of students received internship opportunities, and many are still receiving them. Top roles offered in our course are business associate, assistant manager, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college course and department is good and well-maintained. It provides Wi-Fi facilities in labs. It has a big library with a huge amount of books. The hostel has many facilities like mess, canteen, medical, sports, and games in an appropriate manner.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Better than worst but i think go for some better option here u will just get a degree

content.Placements: Apperently 60 to 70 percentage of students were placed in this educational year Highest package was about 10lpa and lowest was somewere around 3llpa average lies between 3.5 to 4lpa Top recruters of chaitanya university includes Airtel, Hcl,IBM etc. Internships was not at all provided Entry level jobs
content.Infrastructure: Poorly Maintained Facilities: Buildings, classrooms, and labs may be in disrepair, with outdated or malfunctioning equipment. This can impact the learning environment and even pose safety risks. Limited Resources: Libraries, computer labs, and other essential resources might be understocked or not up to modern standards, leaving students without the tools they need for research or study.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and teaching skills.

content.Placements: Good planting of the future in any student masters degree. The lowest package is 15k, and the highest package is 50k. 50 percent of students are placed in schools and colleges. 10 colleges and 15 schools offered the job of engineering in our institute. There are only two top-brand schools available.
content.Infrastructure: Good books are available in library and other general knowledge books are available in the library. Hostel beds per person are there in multiple rooms, with 4 ceiling fans for each room. Wi-Fi classrooms and digital classes are there. The college playground has multiple games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best college with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our college has the best placement, with the highest package of 20 LPA and an average of 7 LPA. Our college is deemed to be a university where big companies like Flipkart, Google, and Microsoft visit. Most of the students are offered an AICTE partner internship in the first year itself.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is well established with good infrastructure and Wi-Fi facilities all over the campus. Our college also has a hostel facility with the best food and 2, 3, and 4 shared room options. We have a canteen facility in our college where faculty also visit during their breaks, and the food is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students get placed in placements. The lowest salary package is 3 LPA and the highest salary package is 10 LPA. Infosys, Google, Microsoft, and more companies are recruiting at our college. Almost 85% get internships at IBM and more. We can easily do an internship if we study at the right time.
content.Infrastructure: The library has all kinds of course books. The college is so cool and good with the block structure and infrastructure. The class is designed with digital classes and virtual classes in every class. We have all kinds of sports available, like cricket, football, basketball, and more.

admission_overview.college_name: Chaitanya University Course Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection Criteria, Application Process

paragraphs: Chaitanya Universityadmission 2025is open for various courses. The institute offers various courses such as BTech, BPharma, MBA, MTech, etc. The selection criteria is a mix of entrance exams and merit-based as per respective courses. To get admitted to CU, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers PhD programme. The application process atChaitanya Universityis conducted both online/offline. Read the article to know more aboutChaitanya Universitycourse admission2025.

Chaitanya University admission 2025is a mix of merit or entrance-based. The university offers more than 15 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Science, Management, etc. The mode of study of the programme is full-time. Check out the following table for details aboutChaitanya University course admissions2025:
Particulars
Chaitanya University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
Download Now
Chaitanya University UG Admission Guideline
Chaitanya University PG Admission Guideline
Chaitanya University PhD Admission Guideline

CU admissions are based on merit or entrance exams. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularChaitanya University courses:
Class 12 with a 45% aggregate
Class 12 with a 45% aggregate
Graduation with a 50% aggregate
Graduation with a 50% aggregate
BTech with 50% aggregate
PG with a 55% aggregate

Chaitanya University admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Chaitanya University is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Chaitanya University Application Process 2025

The application mode is online or offline. For admission to the various UG programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://www.chaitanya.edu.in/online-applications/. However, students looking for offline applications must visit the institute to collect the application form. The application fee is INR 400. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The university considers various entrance exam scores such as GATE, TS EAMCET, etc for admission to the GATE, MTech, BPharma among courses. Post selection criteria, students must visit the university campus for the counselling process. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theChaitanya University feeto confirm their seats at the university.

placement_data.title: Chaitanya University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per the official placement report, Chaitanya University offers placement assistance to all of its students. The institute has an active placement cell that organizes campus recruitment training process to train the students through various in-house and out-of-the-house training sessions. Chaitanya University invites reputed companies for campus placements which include TCS, Genpact, Accenture, Air India, Reliance Group, etc.

Chaitanya University has concluded the placements for the batch Engineering and Management batch passed out in 2024 . As per the latest report, the highest and minimum package offered to Engineering and Technology students during Chaitanya University placements 2024 stood at INR 6 LPA and INR 2 LPA, respectively. Further, the highest and minimum package offered to MBA Class of 2024 stood at INR 4 LPA and INR 2 LPA, respectively. The participating recruiters placed 38 students from the Engineering and Technology course, 19 from MBA and 10 from the MCA course in 2024. The top recruiters of Chaitanya University in 2024 included TCS, Genpact, Accenture, Air India, Reliance Group, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Chaitanya deemed to be a university is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college course and department is good and well-maintained. It provides Wi-Fi facilities in labs. It has a big library with a huge amount of books. The hostel has many facilities like mess, canteen, medical, sports, and games in an appropriate manner.

reviews.review_heading: Better than worst but i think go for some better option here u will just get a degree
reviews.review_text:
Poorly Maintained Facilities: Buildings, classrooms, and labs may be in disrepair, with outdated or malfunctioning equipment. This can impact the learning environment and even pose safety risks.

Limited Resources: Libraries, computer labs, and other essential resources might be understocked or not up to modern standards, leaving students without the tools they need for research or study.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and teaching skills.
reviews.review_text: Good books are available in library and other general knowledge books are available in the library. Hostel beds per person are there in multiple rooms, with 4 ceiling fans for each room. Wi-Fi classrooms and digital classes are there. The college playground has multiple games.

reviews.review_heading: The best college with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college is well established with good infrastructure and Wi-Fi facilities all over the campus. Our college also has a hostel facility with the best food and 2, 3, and 4 shared room options. We have a canteen facility in our college where faculty also visit during their breaks, and the food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The library has all kinds of course books. The college is so cool and good with the block structure and infrastructure. The class is designed with digital classes and virtual classes in every class. We have all kinds of sports available, like cricket, football, basketball, and more.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the facilities that our college provides for the fee structure.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't provide a Wi-Fi facility for students. We have a library and the classrooms of our college are average. Our college doesn't have a canteen. Our college has NCC so interested students can join. Sports and games are also encouraged.

reviews.review_heading: Studying and earning knowledge is my passion .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure of the college are good. We have many facilities like a library, Wi-Fi, fully pleasant classrooms, etc. We have a hostel facility. The food is good and the food is hygienic. W have a mess and canteen in our college. We have sports, events every year.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chaitanya University.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are awesome. We have labs, classrooms, etc., with a pleasant atmosphere. The hostel is also good, and we have all facilities required for students in our hostel. The food is hygienic. We have a canteen, medical facilities, sports, and other extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory as it has good curriculum, satisfactory placements, and above-average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is satisfactory with the college being a bit small for a wide range of courses offered and the number of students studying. But the facilities are good. Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and tidy classrooms are available. The food in hostels and canteens is good. Medical facilities and sports are good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chaitanya University.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like labs and classrooms are not bad, but bathrooms are not managed. There is no water facility, playground, and unprofessional physical instructor. Equipment for sports is also not available. Students have to hustle for their requirements of any kind of facility.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good faculty, placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course/department are labs, classrooms with good maintenance, and a library with a lot of books. We can find every book we want. Hostel facilities are very good. Good quality food is available, but the quantity is not enough for students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is better for students from middle-class families, and the placements are good.
reviews.review_text: We have facilities and infrastructure available for our course like labs, classrooms with CCTV cameras, and a library with lots of books to improve our knowledge. The quality of food available in the mess is good. We can enjoy chicken on Sundays. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is great to pursue engineering.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are good, and our college has everything to complete the course in a proper manner. We have Wi-Fi, and labs contain all the materials to perform in labs. Classrooms are big, and the library is huge with all books. Hostel food is good.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides average packages and roles in college placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent in our college. It provides laboratory for every department with the best equipment with Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms have an occupancy of up to 60 students. It also has access to the library and gymnasium. It also has a playground, basketball court. I am a day scholar. But according to my friend's experience hostels are good. The food is rated around 7 out of 10, and it does have 24X7 medical facilities also.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chaitanya University.
reviews.review_text: The hostel rooms are maintained well neatly. Homely food is provided with specials on weekends and also for some festivals. Double filtered water facilities are available 24/7. Weekly health checkup is done to the students. Yoga sessions are included with the best mentors. A gym is also available.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Chaitanya University

likes.text: Top recruiting companies of our college are Wipro, TCS, Infosys, MRF, etc.
It is a very good college for a student who is looking to get settled in companies through placements.

college_info.college_name: Nehru College of Pharmacy

highlights.summary:
The KEAM 2026 registration for admission to the BE/BTech and BPharma courses is now over. The exam for the same will be conducted from Apr 13, 2026, to Apr 25, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Nehru College of Pharmacy is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Pharma and D.Pharma. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.Pharma. The fee structure for the Nehru College of Pharmacy programmes is around INR 84,000 to 11,40,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates get admitted to the programmes at Nehru College of Pharmacy based on their KEAM and GPAT results. To take part in the entrance-based admissions process for the Nehru College of Pharmacy programmes, candidates may sit for either of the entrance exams. Those who make the short list based on their entrane scores can pay the course fee to guarantee their spot in the program.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by Nehru College of Pharmacy for admissions?

faqs.answer: A:    The eligibility for the courses at Nehru College of Pharmacy are as follows:BPharm: The candidate must have passed Class 12 with 50% aggregat, with English as one of the required courses and Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics/Biology as electives.MPharm: Pass the BPharm degree from any Keralan university or from any other university that the Kerala University of Health Sciences recognises as being equivalent thereto from an institution approved by the AICTE and PCI with at least 55% aggregate.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for courses at Nehru College of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: A:    The Nehru College of Pharmacy accepts KEAM results for admission to various programmes. Following theNehru College of Pharmacy cutoffs from the previous year, the KEAM cutoff percentile for candidates in the General All India category was less than 90. According to the cutoff pattern from previous years, a candidate with a 90 percentile can therefore be admitted to Nehru College of Pharmacy.
faqs.question: Can I get into Nehru College of Pharmacy with 90 percentile in KEAM?

review_content.Placements: Many top hospitals visit our college to recruit students. Some top recruiting companies are Reliance, etc.

review_content.Placements: Placements are average but there are placements from smaller companies. The placements are given in the hospitals like Apollo etc. Nowadays, it's becoming good as with new placements in charge. New opportunities are provided for the students in different companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good with good ambience. Hostel is average. The college premises is greenish with a garden. It is also good to spend time with friends and can enjoy with food from the canteen. Hostel life is best, but I prefer the PG more. The food quality is also average, do not expect good food.

faqs.answer: The following paperwork is needed to complete theNehru College of Pharmacy application and admissions process:Marksheet for Class 10Marksheet for Class 12Government-issued ID KEAM or GPAT marksheetCandidates who have the aforementioned documents can upload them in scanned format to finish the application.
faqs.question: Q: What are the documents required to fill out the application form for Nehru College of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: Candidates get admitted to the programmes at Nehru College of Pharmacy based on their KEAM and GPAT results. To take part in the entrance-based admissions process for the Nehru College of Pharmacy programmes, candidates may sit for either of the entrance exams. Those who make the short list based on their entrane scores can pay the course fee to guarantee their spot in the program.
faqs.question: Q: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by Nehru College of Pharmacy for admissions?

faqs.answer: It is commonly thought that admission to Nehru College of Pharmacy is somewhat competitive. The fundamental requirements for admission to programs such as B.Pharma and D.Pharma are completing the 10+2 exam with a minimum of 50% in Physics, Chemistry and Biology/Mathematics from an accredited board. Although certain schools may require entrance examinations or interviews, admissions are normally based on merit. The demand for pharmacy courses is growing thus the earlier you apply the better your chances are of getting accepted. The selection procedure is open and mostly focused on academic standing. Admission is often simple for candidates who complete the qualifying requirements and submit their applications on time.
faqs.question: Q: Is it easy to get admission in Nehru College of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: The Nehru College of Pharmacy does not offer direct admission to its courses. To be admitted into the programmes, candidates must go through the admissions process and take the entrance exams such as KEAM and GPAT. The Nehru College of Pharmacy does not offer direct admission to any of its courses. To have a chance at being shortlisted, candidates must check out the selection criteria of the course.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission to Nehru College of Pharmacy?
