overview_faqs.question: How good is Nehru College of Pharmacy for B.Pharma?
overview_faqs.answer: Hi.Nehru College of Pharmacy is accredited by NBA and approved by AICTE and Pharmacy Council of India (PCI).Nehru College of Pharmacy is an integral part of 19 chain institutes under Nehru Group of Institutions (NGI) and is affiliated to Kerala University of Health and Sciences (KUHS).Nehru College of Pharmacy offers a decent placement rate, with students from almost all the courses getting placement assistance. During Nehru College of Pharmacy placements 2023, a total of 78 UG 4-years and 13 PG 2-years students were placed in reputed companies. Further, the median package offered to UG 4-years and PG 2-years students during Nehru College of Pharmacy placements 2023 was INR 12.48 LPA and INR 2.60 LPA, respectively.Thanks

review_summary.college_name: Nehru College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, dissatisfied with faculty, amazing fests, course opportunities, and placements.

content.Placements: Top companies who provide placements are Sun Pharma, Dr. Reddy, Cipla etc. Hospitals that provide placements are Apollo Hospital, PK Das Hospital, Daya Hospital, etc. Internships are offered by PK Das Hospital. Last year, around 65% of students got placed in different places. They have a very impressive pass percentage.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very impressive here. We have Wi-Fi, classrooms, clean labs, and a library with almost 1 lack of books, and digital libraries. We have all the latest versions of textbooks. The hostel has great facilities. The food is not up to the standard. Photostat, spiral binding, printing, etc., are available inside the campus itself.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Nehru College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Many top hospitals visit our college to recruit students. Some top recruiting companies are Reliance, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is the best in Kerala. All equipment and chemicals are available in the lab.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are well-qualified. They make us confident to attend exams. The course curriculum is good. Our college conducts exams suddenly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This college is good for being a pharmacist.

content.Placements: Placements are average but there are placements from smaller companies. The placements are given in the hospitals like Apollo etc. Nowadays, it's becoming good as with new placements in charge. New opportunities are provided for the students in different companies.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good with good ambience. Hostel is average. The college premises is greenish with a garden. It is also good to spend time with friends and can enjoy with food from the canteen. Hostel life is best, but I prefer the PG more. The food quality is also average, do not expect good food.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharma, etc. Almost 80% of students got internships from our course. Top roles offered are medical manager, medicine-making, teacher, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides many facilities. Wi-Fi is available in our college, but the speed is not enough. Labs are present for every subject but not properly cleaned. Our college has a library. The food served in the hostel is not good. Medical facilities are not available in our college. Our college never shows interest in sports.

admission_overview.college_name: Nehru College of Pharmacy Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_overview.title: Nehru College of Pharmacy Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Nehru College of Pharmacy admissions are merit-based. The institution evaluates the score of the candidates in the last qualifying exam for admission. Nehru College of Pharmacy offers 7 courses which includes B.Pharma, D.Pharma and M.Pharma, etc. Courses offered here are in affiliation with Kerala University of Health Sciences. Candidates can apply online for their preferred programme or reach out to the admission office for offline admission.

eligibility_selection.title: Nehru College of Pharmacy Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Candidates must fulfill the requirements for the Nehru College of Pharmacy's programmes in order to be considered for admission. To find out more about the eligibility and selection requirements for courses at the Nehru College of Pharmacy courses, refer to the table below:

courses_table.eligibility: A minimum of 50 % aggregate in graduation
A minimum of 50 % aggregate in Class 12
A minimum of 50 % aggregate in Class 12
A minimum of 50 % aggregate in graduation

faqs.answer: The eligibility for the courses at Nehru College of Pharmacy are as follows:BPharm: The candidate must have passed Class 12 with 50% aggregat, with English as one of the required courses and Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics/Biology as electives.MPharm: Pass the BPharm degree from any Keralan university or from any other university that the Kerala University of Health Sciences recognises as being equivalent thereto from an institution approved by the AICTE and PCI with at least 55% aggregate.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for courses at Nehru College of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: KEAM and GPAT scores are used to shortlist candidates. Candidates who clear the minimum cutoff that has been set by the institute are invited for the next rounds of admissions. Candidates can secure their seat by paying the course fee once they have received the final admission offer. Candidates can continue attending the classes in regular mode once they have been allotted a seat.
faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for the courses at Nehru College of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: The overall cutoff rank for KEAM is 9753. To get detailed KEAM cutoff information for Nehru College of Pharmacy 2024, you can check out the link mentioned below:Nehru College of Pharmacy, Thrissur Cutoff 2023/2022/2021: Round-wise for all CoursesIf you need more information about the cutoffs of the college, check the college's official website.

courses_data.description: Nehru College of Pharmacyoffers B.Pharma for 4 years at the UG level. This course is offered in full time mode. courses_data.name: D.Pharma Admissions 2026
courses_data.description: At the UG level,Nehru College of Pharmacyoffers D.Pharma in full time mode. The programme is offered for a duration of 2 years. The curriculum is divided into 4 semesters. Nehru College of Pharmacy D.Pharma admissions are merit-based and students are required to complete graduation. Some other key highlights for Nehru College of Pharmacy D.Pharma admissions are given below: Nehru College of Pharmacy D.Pharma fees isINR 84,000and includes caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc. Some of these are charged only once during admissions. The M.Pharma is offered in Pharmacy Practice, Pharmaceutical and Pharmacognosy specialisation. The Nehru College of Pharmacy M.Pharma fee isINR 4,30,000depending upon the specialisation. faqs.question: Which specialisations are offered by Nehru College of Pharmacy in the MPharm programme?
faqs.answer: Nehru College of Pharmacy offers three specialisations for candidates to choose from. The specialisations on offer are:MPharm in PharmaceuticsMPharm in Pharmacognosy and PhytochemistryMPharm in Pharmacy PracticeCandidates who get the final admission offer are eligible to choose from the specialisations based on their entrance score and merit.

faqs.answer: The seat intake for MPharm at Nehru College of Pharmacy is45.Candidates are shortlisted on the basis of their performance in the GPAT. faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Nehru College of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: The Nehru College of Pharmacy does not offer direct admission to its courses. To be admitted into the programmes, candidates must go through the admissions process and take the entrance exams such as KEAM and GPAT.The Nehru College of Pharmacy does not offer direct admission to any of its courses. To have a chance at being shortlisted, candidates must check out the selection criteria of the course.

placement_report.college_name: Nehru College of Pharmacy Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Nehru College of Pharmacy Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Nehru College of Pharmacy has released the NIRF report 2024. According to the report, 78 UG 4-years and 13 PG 2-years students were placed during Nehru College of Pharmacy placements 2023. Further, the median package offered to UG 4-year and PG 2-year students during Nehru College of Pharmacy placements 2023 was INR 12.48 LPA and INR 2.60 LPA , respectively. The top recruiters of Nehru College of Pharmacy during the past years included Amrita Hospitals, Apollo Hospitals, Abbott, Aster Pharma, Covance, Aurobindo, etc .

faqs.question: What are the job opportunities after doing D.Pharma from Nehru College of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: Hi.There are many opportunities after completion of D.Pharma coursefrom Nehru College of Pharmacy:- You can get job at drug stores of private or government hospitals. You can work in health clinics, NGOs, community health centres by checking the prescriptions, dispensing medicines and give them advice and directions. You may get entry level jobs in pharmaceutical companies at various divisions like Process Control, Manufacturing and Quality Control.You can also work as Medical Representative. If you have entrepreneurial spirit, you can open your own retail pharmacy outlet, wholesale business or surgical items shop. Thanks

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Drs. Kiran and Pallavi Patel Global University.

review_content.Placements: Top recruiting companies are L&T and InfoChip. Top roles offered are graphic designer and web developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are two different hostel buildings for girls and boys. Our campus has around 2-3 Wi-Fi connections. The food served in every hostel is very good. Our college has 3-4 grounds for sports like volleyball, football, and cricket.
review_content.Faculty: Our faculty members are very excellent, qualified, and experienced. Semseter exams are moderate and provide proper practice for final exams. There are three exams every semester, of which two are mid-semester exams, and the other is the final exam.

reviews_list.review_title: I would not recommend taking admission here.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell is good. About 70% of students get placements in the final year. The average salary package is 4.5 LPA and the lowest to date is 3 LPA. overview_faqs.question: Can Drs. Kiran and Pallavi Patel Global University be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Drs. Kiran and Pallavi Patel Global University is a renowned institution offering BBA, B.Com, BPT, MPT, B.Sc, B.A, B.Pharma, GNM, B.A.M.S, M.Pharma, MBA/PGDM, B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma, M.E./M.Tech. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce, Medicine & Health Sciences, Science, Humanities & Social Sciences, Nursing, Engineering. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Drs. Kiran and Pallavi Patel Global University boasts an impressive review rating of 4.12 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4.17 for Campus Life, 3.73 for Placements, 4.3 for Faculty, and 4.55 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Drs. Kiran and Pallavi Patel Global University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Education is really good.

content.Placements: The highest percentage is 80 percent of students were placed in this course. I am pursuing the course. I do not have much idea about the companies. My brother told me that in our college the recruitment is done by the top companies and offers well.
content.Infrastructure: Every facility is available in this college. Everything is well maintained and hygienic. Our canteen is also clean and hygienic and the quality of food is also good. Everything is well managed by the authorities. Classroom, library etc are well maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Chemistry, Biotechnology, Microbiology) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good faculty members and placements.

content.Placements: Almost 50-80% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA. The lowest salary offered was Rs 5,000 per month. The average salary offered ranges between Rs 25,000 per month - Rs 45,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharmaceutical Industries and Zydus Cadila Healthcare. Around 80-90% of students got internships in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratory is very good. All facilities are available. The food served in the canteen is very good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very good. The teaching quality is better. Our college has different teachers for each subject. They are helpful and skilled. Semester exams are moderate. The pass criterion is 7-9 CGPA.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Drs. Kiran and Pallavi Patel Global University.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies are L&T and InfoChip. Top roles offered are graphic designer and web developer.
content.Infrastructure: There are two different hostel buildings for girls and boys. Our campus has around 2-3 Wi-Fi connections. The food served in every hostel is very good. Our college has 3-4 grounds for sports like volleyball, football, and cricket.
content.Faculty: Our faculty members are very excellent, qualified, and experienced. Semseter exams are moderate and provide proper practice for final exams. There are three exams every semester, of which two are mid-semester exams, and the other is the final exam.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I would not recommend taking admission here.

content.Placements: The placement cell is good. About 70% of students get placements in the final year. The average salary package is 4.5 LPA and the lowest to date is 3 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA. Many companies come for the recruitment process. TCS and Amazon are among the top recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. The hostel is not good. The laundry service is not up to date. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games is not good. The Wi-Fi is not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Campus is very huge and the teachers are very well educated.

content.Placements: 98 percentage students are placed. Amazon, Tcs. The best recruitment process is done here. Many foreign companies now comes into the campus recruitment. Each and every student gets an internship through college. Good placement cell is there in the college.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is near campus. Nice food service. Excellent security. Huge campus with high-class teaching faculty. High-class greenery. Canteen facilities are there in the college. Every sports facility there in the college. Every year a sports week is conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is very huge and the teachers are very well educated.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is near campus. Nice food service. Excellent security. Huge campus with high-class teaching faculty. High-class greenery. Canteen facilities are there in the college. Every sports facility there in the college. Every year a sports week is conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Not good placement, supportive faculty, nice infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is really good and there are lush green gardens in our college. The labs and classrooms are good but the classroom doesn't have AC. The library is also very good and contains 2 floors. The hostel location is just beside the college and it s really good. The food quality is really good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the infrastructure and facilities on campus.
reviews.review_text: The college has one of the best infrastructures. The reason for giving 4 stars is the quality of food available in the mess. The mess food is below average I would say. The Wi-Fi facility and gymnasium are good. Labs also have a nice structure and facilities. The classrooms have nice ventilation and a proper study environment.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good infrastructure and teachers, but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: Our college is full of greenery which is eye soothing. The infrastructure is good in our college but there is no air-conditioner in the classroom due to which students face difficulty in summers for attending lectures. The hostel is very good and contains a mess and a gym. The laboratories are good and the library is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good faculty members and average infrastructure, but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very greenery. It provides computer laboratories with the best internet connection. But classrooms are without air-conditioners so students are suffering on summer days. Smart classrooms are available but rarely students get a chance to visit, apart from a lush green garden.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good teachers, infrastructure, and facilities, but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very good with a lush garden. Our campus is very cool as there is a lot of greenery. The hostel is very good and well maintained. Rector sir is also very helpful and solves problems quickly. The classrooms do not contain air-conditioner which makes it difficult to attend a lecture in summer.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good faculty, poor placements, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure with lush green gardens and a good environment. The campus is very good and classrooms are also good but there is no air-conditioner in classes because of which we suffer difficulties in summer. The campus also consists of a teapost and two stationeries.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and good placement .
reviews.review_text: College is located at a good area surrounded by a good environmental conditions and connected to a highway. The college has many facilities for sports and 2-3 play grounds. It also has well-equipped laboratory and workshops for every fields of students. It also provide hostel facility which has a valuable and reasonable price and provide good facility.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good placements and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the hostel is average. Sometimes hot water is not available. But the most important the hostel is clean and safe. The hostel rooms are big enough for 2-3 students. Facilities are also available like freeze, air-conditioners, chair, table, etc. The hostel has a volleyball ground and a cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty and placement is average.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure and campus is beautiful and facilities provided by our college is quite good and wi-fi provided by our college is with restriction and classrooms are very good and library is also good. Food quality in the canteen is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the campus is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is pretty awesome, and you will feel like you are studying abroad. All labs and classrooms are perfect. But at some rainwater may create some problems in college, but overall there is no comprise in college or hostel infrastructure. The canteen and sports place are also good.

college_info.college_name: Burdwan University (BU): Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Scholarships, Placements

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Burdwan University ranks #36 under the category 'State Public University'.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: - 36th by NIRF under the State Public University category - 125th by the QS Rankings under the Asian University Rankings - Southern Asia category - 451-500 by the QS Rankings under the Asian University Rankings category

college_info.intro:
Burdwan University popular programmes are BSc and MBA. MBA students are placed in top companies. MBA and BSc students are taught technical as well as communication skills. BSc students are taught about Biodiversity, Plant Ecology and Taxonomy, and others. MBA students can become Managers, Team Leaders, or can go for further studies such as PhD, MPhil, or others.
Burdwan University MBA is provided in various specialisations such as Finance, Marketing, IR, HR, Systems & Operations, Media Management, and others. Overall, Burdwan University is one of the top universities present in India. The university is ranked 451-500 by the QS Rankings 2024 under the Asian University Rankings category, 125th by the QS Rankings 2024 under the Asian University Rankings - Southern Asia category, and 36th by NIRF 2024 under the State Public University category. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Burdwan University and their respective eligibility and Burdwan University fee structure:

placements.overview: The mode of Burdwan University course admissions is online. Admission to various courses is based on entrance exam scores and merit. The accepted entrance exams are MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT, GMAT, and others. Candidates applying through XAT must first register for the XAT exam. Then appear for the XAT exam. Then visit the official website and apply for the relevant course. Pay the application fee and admission fee for confirming admission. The below-mentioned are Burdwan University admission dates for 2024:

reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty and affordable fees.

review_content.Placements: I was from the BCA batch and the placement of the college was very limited as it was a very small college. Some internships were available from Infosys and other firms, but direct placement from campus was very hard to secure. Most students in this college preferred higher studies like MCA or applied for jobs off-campus to build their careers.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure was not very good as expected from the fee structure. But it had labs, free Wi-Fi, and a library where we could get books whenever we wanted. The college did not have any official hostel. The college conducted its sports program every year. The college did not provide mess or canteen facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Pure Sciences - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: A peaceful place to learn and grow.

review_content.Placements: 0% students got placed from our course. There is no package variation in our college because no companies have come for placement. There are no recruiting companies in our course because no placement cell is there. 80%-85% of students got internships from my course, which is provided by our college. Roles offered in our course, many students go for government exam preparations, and some have gone for higher studies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is fully available on the whole campus with great internet connections. Classrooms are big enough that many students can sit comfortably, and also classrooms are dirty. A central library with a large collection of books and reference books. Reading rooms are also available. The college has hostels for boys and girls. The rooms are well maintained. Food in the canteen is of very good quality and hygienic. There is a health centre and a first aid facility on campus. The college has sports teams for football, cricket, volleyball, etc. There are big playgrounds for outdoor games, and there is also an indoor games facility like table tennis and carrom.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I actually love the college and also the teachers. They are very helpful and cooperative.

review_content.Placements: It's very easy to get a placement in this college. They don't judge you according to your ability. But they focus on building your ability stronger. Basically, 90 per cent of the students get placed in high-ranking and good-ranking jobs. Our batch has not passed out yet.

review_summary.college_name: Burdwan University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good but Un lazy happened.

content.Placements: Placement was good but it was not a perfect and cannot stand among the top Universities. In my batch we received between 3Lc two digits packages. Our batch was not getting placement. There was a small number of students who got placement on the placement cell but its good.
content.Infrastructure: These small fees we received huge facilities as per fees. There were hostel facilities for long distance students two beds or 3 beds rooms available. Labs & Classrooms were in good condition. Lastly the Library was satisfied that not all books are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Suri Vidyasagar College, Burdwan University review.

content.Placements: There is a placement in written format, not fully supporting the actual life. But you should expect placement that happens from here. There are too limited courses and particular eligibility for their placement; providing placement has too limited seat numbers.
content.Infrastructure: You can expect from this college, like a typical government, providing facilities like minimal classroom facilities, library, science lab, and other things also available there, and you can enjoy their facilities. There is a canteen available, along with medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (Hons.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and affordable fees.

content.Placements: I was from the BCA batch and the placement of the college was very limited as it was a very small college. Some internships were available from Infosys and other firms, but direct placement from campus was very hard to secure. Most students in this college preferred higher studies like MCA or applied for jobs off-campus to build their careers.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure was not very good as expected from the fee structure. But it had labs, free Wi-Fi, and a library where we could get books whenever we wanted. The college did not have any official hostel. The college conducted its sports program every year. The college did not provide mess or canteen facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Pure Sciences - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A peaceful place to learn and grow.

content.Placements: 0% students got placed from our course. There is no package variation in our college because no companies have come for placement. There are no recruiting companies in our course because no placement cell is there. 80%-85% of students got internships from my course, which is provided by our college. Roles offered in our course, many students go for government exam preparations, and some have gone for higher studies.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is fully available on the whole campus with great internet connections. Classrooms are big enough that many students can sit comfortably, and also classrooms are dirty. A central library with a large collection of books and reference books. Reading rooms are also available. The college has hostels for boys and girls. The rooms are well maintained. Food in the canteen is of very good quality and hygienic. There is a health centre and a first aid facility on campus. The college has sports teams for football, cricket, volleyball, etc. There are big playgrounds for outdoor games, and there is also an indoor games facility like table tennis and carrom.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I actually love the college and also the teachers. They are very helpful and cooperative.

content.Placements: It's very easy to get a placement in this college. They don't judge you according to your ability. But they focus on building your ability stronger. Basically, 90 per cent of the students get placed in high-ranking and good-ranking jobs. Our batch has not passed out yet.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. The surrounding nature is also soothing to the mind as well as the heart. There are no such noise disturbances around the college. People gather on the college campus for useless activities.

admission_overview.college_name: Burdwan University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: Burdwan University or Bardhman University admissions 2025is bothmerit-basedandentrance-based. The university offers more than32 coursesat UG, PG, diploma and doctoral levels in several specialisations.Burdwan Universityadmissions are based on the merit of the previous qualifying exam for most of the UG & PG courses. For admission toMBA, MTech, and LLBcourses, candidates have to qualify forMAT, GATE, andUniversity-level written tests. The Burdwan University admission process usually begins inJunefor most of the PG courses.

Burdwan University has a University Insitute of Technology(UIT)and also a Burdwan Distance Education Institute.UIT BurdwanoffersB.E. and M.E.programmes in seven specialisations including CSE, IT, and ECE. Read the following article to learn more about Burdwan University admission 2025:

Burdwan University (BU) is the second-largest state university in West Bengal. There are several postgraduate departments and affiliated colleges that offer both full-time and distance learning courses. Bardhman University'saffiliated collegesprovide approximatelyten undergraduate coursesin the fields ofArts,Science,Commerce,Managementand many more. Check out the Burdwan University admission 2025 details below:
Particulars
Burdwan University AdmissionHighlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Offline
Application status 2025
Fee range across the courses
INR 2,000 - INR 3 lakh
Level of programmes offered
UG, PG, Doctoral & Diploma
Popular programmes
MBA | BSc | LLB
Prospectus 2025

Burdwan University course admissions are both merit and entrance-based. Every candidate must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria along with the other rounds of the admission process. Candidates awaiting results of the final qualifying examination can be allowed for admission but they must submit their results on or before the date of the test/ interview.

The merit list for Five-yearB.A. LLB (Honours)has been released, and thewritten testis to be held onSep 19, 2025.For admission toMBA, GD and PI will be conducted betweenSep 17, 2025,andSep 20, 2025. Interested candidates seeking admission can check the following table to learn about admission requirements for B.A. LLB & MBA along with other courses available at Burdwan University:
UG degree with a minimum 60% aggregate,
Minimum 20% score in GD and PI separately
Class 12 with minimum 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category) & Maximum age should be 21 for General (22 for SC, ST & OBC candidates)
Class 12 withany oneof the following subjects :Mathematics/ Statistics/ Computer Science/ Computer Application/ Business Economics & Mathematics (BEM)OR
Class 12 with Vocational Engineering & Technology with pass marks in Additional Mathematics
Candidates who get selected must payBurdwan University feesfor the respective courses. The fees may include various components such as tuition fee, admission fee, examination fee, etc.

Coming to affordability, It is among the causes of many students quitting college or their degree. While access to college-level studies has been made possible by the availability of education loans and scholarships, the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Further, the course-wise tuition fee and average salary details are mentioned below:
*The above fee is taken from unofficial sources. Hence, are indicative. Candidates are requested to visit the official website to learn more about Bardhman University fees.

The number of seats varies from programme to programme and is updated before the admission each year. Reservation for SC/ ST and DA candidates will be as per the rules. Burdwan University's MTech programme has a limited intake capacity, while theBSc programmecan be filled bya very largenumber of students. Apart from this, the annual intake through WBJEE in the B.E. programme is 350+ seats, and the M.E. programme has a capacity of 35+ students qualifying for GATE. The table below provides the seat intake for some of the courses offered at Burdwan University:
Note: Above information is taken from the official website and hence, is indicative.

AT Burdwan, few seats are reserved for Burdwan University (Home University quota) passed-out students. the reservation forSC/ ST/ OBC/ EWS/ DAwill be applicable as per the rule of Government.Differently Abled (DA)candidates can avail5% reservationin each of the categories. Candidates claiming reservation against SC/ST/DA quota must submit valid certificates from appropriate authorities.Seat reservations also can vary depending on the programme at Burdwan University. Find out the seat reservations at BU:
Note: Note: Above information is taken from the official website and hence, is indicative.

Bardhaman University or Burdwan University admission process is common for most of the undergraduate & postgraduate courses. University of Burdwan course admissions usually start in June for its on-campus courses. Candidates can check out the details process for Burdwan University admission in the following section:
1 - Burdwan University Application

The Bardhman University admission process starts with filling out the application process in online mode for the respective courses. Candidates who are interested in getting admission to any of the UG & PG courses at BU can apply on the university's official website (www.buruniv.ac.in). Application forms can be obtained from the university website. To learn more about engineering courses application(B.E./ M.E.),candidates can visit theUITwebsite(uit.buruniv.ac.in/)
2 - Burdwan University Selection Rounds

Admission to most of the UG & PG courses at the University of Burdwan is merit-based. Candidates are selected o a merit basis with the college acceptIng scores of last qualifying exam. For MTech, LLB, MBA, etc., the minimum eligibility is qualifying respective entrance exams.
3 - Burdwan University Counselling Process
After selection round is completed, course-wise counselling process is conducted online. The counselling process is conducted in multiple phases according to the availability of the seats.
4 - Merit List Release
After counselling process is completed, the university will release a merit list of shortlisted candidates. For seats that are left vacant vacant, the university releases lists in further rounds.
5 - Fee Payment & Document Verification

Selected candidates for final admission, must collect theAdmission Brochurealong with theAdmission Formfrom the Sales Counter of the UIT and submit the filled-in form to the office at the time of admission. Also, candidates have to pay the course fee to confirm the seat within a stipulated deadline. The final admission will be confirmed only after the candidates' document verification by the concerned Department/ Centre.

faqs.answer: For admission to Burdwan University LLB course, candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria before applying for the course. To get admission to a three year PG course of LLB at the University of Burdwan, candidates must pass graduation with minimum 45% aggregate. Candidates belonging to SC/ST categories can obtain minimum of 40% aggregate. There is no age bar for the applicants to apply for the course.

courses_data.description: Burdwan University or Bardhman University offers an integrated course of B.A. LLB in the field of law. Direct admission is offered to candidates who fulfill the minimum eligibility criteria to apply for the course. faqs.question: Are admissions open for BA LLB course at Burdwan University?
faqs.answer: Admissions are going to open soon. Once open, students should go and apply on the official website. The admissions are done based on the last qualifying exam marks.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to BA LLB at Burdwan University?
faqs.answer: In order to get admission to a five-year integrated course ofBA LLB at Burdwan University, candidates must pass Class 12 in any stream. Based on the merit scores of candidates obtained in the last qualifying exam, candidates will be offered direct admission to the course by the university. Merit list of the selected candidates will be released in various rounds. There is no entrance exam  required for admission.

faqs.question: Who can apply to BA LLB at Burdwan University?
faqs.answer: To apply for BA LLB course at Burdwan University, candidates are required to pass the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. As per the course requirements, applicants must pass Class 12 in any stream from a recognised board obtaining with minimum of 45% aggregate in total. Other than this, there is a relaxation of five percent for candidates belonging to SC, ST and OBC categories. Such candidates are required to attain a minimum of 40% aggregate in the final examination of Class 12.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam required for admission to BA LLB course at Burdwan University?
faqs.answer: No, there is not entrance exam accepted for admission to the Burdwan University BA LLB course. In order to secure a seat at Burdwan University, candidates must pass Class 12 with minimum 45% aggregate and submit their scores & valid scorecards at the time of filling the application form. The university offers direct admission to candidates who pass the selection parameters and meet the educational requirements of the course.

description: Burdwan University cutoff 2025 is out for admission to the BE/BTech courses via the WBJEE entrance exam. Students can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoffs for various rounds, categories and years. A few more exam-related updates are given below:

Burdwan University WBJEE Cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to the BE/BTech courses for all rounds and categories under the All India quota. For the General AI category, the last round cutoff ranged from 10776 to 29645, wherein the toughest course for competition was B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with the overall cutoff ranging from 7888 to 10776 in the first and last rounds, respectively.

The Burdwan University BE cutoff 2025 was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for admission to various BE course specialisations. For the General AI category, the most sought-after course was B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with the last round cutoff of 10776. In 2024, the cutoff was 8070, and in 2023, it was 25498. This difference in the last round ranks shows that there has been fluctuation in the cutoff over the past three years.

The WBJEE exam is conducted by West Bengal Joint Entrance Examinations Board (WBJEEB) once a year for admission to the BTech course. Students who want admission to Burdwan University for its BE course via the WBJEE entrance exam can refer to the table below to know the important dates regarding admission.

The Burdwan University released the BE course cutoff for various categories, like General, OBC, SC, ST, etc., who belong to the All India quota. Students who had appeared for the counselling rounds can refer to the table below to know the round and year-wise cutoff for 2025, 2024 and 2023. The cutoff is available for all categories in the form of consolidated PDF files.

highlights.description: Burdwan University has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #151-200 in the University category, and #51-100 under State Public University by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around Burdwan University rankings:

nirf.description:
Burdwan University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have dropped in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Burdwan University fell 50 ranks to #151 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The institute has demonstrated a decreasing trend in the 'State Public University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Burdwan University fell 15 ranks to #51 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the Burdwan University latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

qs_world.description:
Burdwan University has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Burdwan University fell 61 ranks to #682 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Burdwan University fell 20 ranks to #207 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Suri Vidyasagar College, Burdwan UniversityReviewed on 17 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good but Un lazy happened.
reviews.review_text: These small fees we received huge facilities as per fees. There were hostel facilities for long distance students two beds or 3 beds rooms available. Labs & Classrooms were in good condition. Lastly the Library was satisfied that not all books are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Suri Vidyasagar College, Burdwan UniversityReviewed on 14 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Suri Vidyasagar College, Burdwan University review.
reviews.review_text: You can expect from this college, like a typical government, providing facilities like minimal classroom facilities, library, science lab, and other things also available there, and you can enjoy their facilities. There is a canteen available, along with medical facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Chandannagar Institute of Management and TechnologyReviewed on 22 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and affordable fees.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was not very good as expected from the fee structure. But it had labs, free Wi-Fi, and a library where we could get books whenever we wanted. The college did not have any official hostel. The college conducted its sports program every year. The college did not provide mess or canteen facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Government General Degree College, KalnaReviewed on 6 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A peaceful place to learn and grow.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is fully available on the whole campus with great internet connections. Classrooms are big enough that many students can sit comfortably, and also classrooms are dirty. A central library with a large collection of books and reference books. Reading rooms are also available. The college has hostels for boys and girls. The rooms are well maintained. Food in the canteen is of very good quality and hygienic. There is a health centre and a first aid facility on campus. The college has sports te...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sir Rashbehari Ghosh MahavidyalayaReviewed on 4 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I actually love the college and also the teachers. They are very helpful and cooperative.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The surrounding nature is also soothing to the mind as well as the heart. There are no such noise disturbances around the college. People gather on the college campus for useless activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Suri Vidyasagar College, Burdwan UniversityReviewed on 22 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Suri Vidyasagar College is an excellent academic institution.
reviews.review_text: All classes have a smart board and a projector facility. Nowadays, AC has also been installed for students, and Wi-Fi is also available in all departments. Free library access to all, which is open only during college hours. The food at the hostel is not good enough, but the canteen food is normal. All types of medical facilities are available. Basketball stadium, carrom, cricket playground, all necessary things are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Memari CollegeReviewed on 4 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Loving the experience in this college.
reviews.review_text: There is a separate computer Lab and a separate lab for digital electronics where we can do experiments on digital electronics. The computer lab consists of 20 pcs, all top notch, and we also have a different classroom for theory classes. The college did not have a hostel system.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, good placements in 2018, and food quality.
reviews.review_text: Facilities here are acceptable infrastructure too, some libraries and labs are available. Quality of food is hygienic, as many mess and canteens are available with great quality of food. Medical facilities are also available, along with sports and outdoor games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Burdwan Raj CollegeReviewed on 24 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: You can get admission easily from my college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of my college include Wi-Fi, and the labs were very good. The last food in my college was amazing, all varieties of food were available in my college, you can buy anything from the canteen.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Burdwan Institute of Management and Computer ScienceReviewed on 24 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My review of Great things on BIMCS.
reviews.review_text: There are enough computer systems and a good Wi-Fi connection.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Hooghly Mohsin CollegeReviewed on 21 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Positive faculty members and decent placements, but some infrastructure shortcomings.
reviews.review_text: College provides a range of facilities to support students' academic and extracurricular activities. These include well-equipped classrooms, various specialized labs in physics, chemistry, microbiology, etc. A central instrumentation facility, a library with an e-resource center, and Wi-Fi is enabled throughout the campus. Also, there are resources like raspberry PI kits, audio-visual aids, and dedicated spaces like an auditorium and seminar halls for various academic and cultural events.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by University Institute of Technology, The University Of BurdwanReviewed on 28 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college will give you lots of memories, but not a good placement.
reviews.review_text: At this university, you will have access to numerous courses; in fact, you can pursue a master's degree here, as it is a reputable institution. The hostels are quite good but not so impressive. The infrastructure is ancient. There is no regular maintenance that's why you don't expect to get AC rooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by University Institute of Technology, The University Of BurdwanReviewed on 23 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overpriced and underwhelming, a wasted opportunity.
reviews.review_text: Houston Quarry is not so good because we have to equip Wi-Fi with our money offering shared drones based on the amenities. Common areas and food in the mess receive mixed reviews ranging from bad to good. The food is not good but oily while canteen food is slightly better for snacks. Medical facilities are available via the investing health center and proximity to our medical college. Sports are not encouraged with on campus facilities and the university playground is not very accessible.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by University Institute of Technology, The University Of BurdwanReviewed on 23 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Decent college with supportive faculty, but average infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The department has basic facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The hostel is average with limited amenities. Mess and canteen food are manageable. Medical support is minimal, and sports facilities are basic, with few regular activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Vivekananda Mahavidyalaya, BurdwanReviewed on 18 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: After all the things I’ve told you, I can say that this college is amazing.
reviews.review_text: There are a lot of facilities in the infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available in all the departments. Classrooms are clean, and labs and the library are air-conditioned to survive the summer season. Sports, medical, and canteen facilities are available on our college campus. They are clean and cool.

college_info.college_name: Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements

highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Sri Venkateswara College Of Pharmacy,Chittoor admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: RVS Nagar, Tirupati Rd, Chittoor, Andhra Pradesh
SVCP Chittoor, Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy
Apollo Pharmacy, MedPlus, Biocon, Dr Reddy's Laboratories Ltd

college_info.intro:
Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy flagship programmes are BPharm and MPharm. At SVCOP Chittoor, the BPharm programme is a four-year full-time course. The MPharm programme (offered in Pharmaceutics, Pharmacology, Pharmacy Practice, and Regulatory Affairs) is a two-year (four-semester) full-time course. BPharm and MPharm students are placed in top companies such as Apollo Pharmacy, MedPlus, Biocon, Dr Reddy's Laboratories Ltd, Aurobindo, Accenture, and Micro Lab, among others.
Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy provides international quality education to students. Overall, Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy is one of the best colleges offering quality education to students. After completing their education at Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, students can become pharmacists, drug inspectors, food inspectors, medical underwriters, or even open a drugstore, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy and their respective eligibility and SVCP fee structure:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor offers PG and UG courses to students. At the UG level, the SVCP offers a BPharm course to students. At the PG level, the college offers DPharm and MPharm programmes to students. Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy fee structure includes a tuition fee ranging from INR 1.8 lakh to INR 3.9 lakh, depending on the level and duration of the course. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy and their respective eligibility and SVCP fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    The eligibility criteria for Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor is differ from one course to another. To be eligible for BPharma, applicants must have completed Class 12 in PCMB with 50% aggregate from a recognised board. For MPharma and PharD courses, applicants must have pass BPharma degree with at least 50% aggregate.Given below Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor courses eligibility criteria and selection criteria:BPharma:Eligiblity: Pass Class 10 and Class 12 with Physics& Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with Mathematics or Biology with 50% aggregateSelection Criteria: Andhra Pradesh EAMCET+ CounsellingMPharma:Eligiblity: BPharma with 50% aggregateSelection Criteria: Andhra Pradesh EAMCET, GPAT + CounsellingPharmaD:Eligiblity: BPharma with 50% aggregateSelection Criteria: Andhra Pradesh PGECET/GPAT+ Counselling
faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor?

faqs.answer: A:    The fee for the PharmD course at Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor includes various components including tuition fee and registration fee. The tuition fee of PharmD is INR 3.9 Lacs per year. Candidates who want admission to Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor can visit the official website to register for admission.
faqs.question: What is the fee for PharmD at Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor?

faqs.answer: A:    For admission into the MPharm programme in pharmaceutics at Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor, candidates must have a BPharm degree with a minimum of 50% marks and 45% for reserved category from an AICTE and UGC approved institution. Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy course admission is entirely entrance-based. Additionally, the college also provides admission based on management quota. SVCP BPharm and MPharm admissions are based on AP EAMCET, AP PGECET, GPAT, and the previous year’s qualifying exam score.
faqs.question: I want to know about the latest cutoff information for MPharm in Pharmaceutics at Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor.

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for BTech is INR 1.8 lakh. The fee includes tuition fees such as a complete course. Applicants are required to pay some amount of fee after completion of all the selection rounds to lock the final seats. If a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, the college rejects their application. The provided total tuition fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Complete review of SVCOP.

content.Placements: 60% of students got placed on campus placements. The highest package is 5.5 LPA and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. Cipla, Cognizant, and Sun Pharma are top recruiting companies. Placement option is available for this time as all faculty members are serious about the placements and training for us.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of hostel is nice as it is an international hostel of students from different countries. Food is nice but only problem is water facilities are bad. There is central library and it contains only a narrow range of text books and limited journals.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Waste of college for skills learning and syllabus teaching.

content.Placements: There are placements for this college like Apollo and MedPlus. There are no medical coding companies and industries. They don't teach any extra skills like medical coding, etc. Only syllabus they will say, sometimes they do not say properly only share slides. So, there are no placements.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, infrastructure is good but not excellent. In college, infrastructure is nice. But the hostel has bad infrastructure and no proper bathroom facilities. Sometimes bathroom lights are also not proper. But outside of the hostel garden is very peaceful.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: No placements offered in the past 2 years in this college and it is expected to get placements this year. Our seniors didn't get any placement options. This time college management is trying to get the companies for placements in our college hope we will get it soon.
content.Infrastructure: Course is really awesome. The flow of the course made it easy to study and co-relate things. It also helps me to better understand. Hostel is okay but the main problem is water even we do not get drinking water sometimes. Food is nice and they maintain proper hygiene.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a top pharmacy college.

content.Placements: Companies like Reddys Laboratory, Hetero Pharma, and Aurobindo Pharma recruit students. Almost 60-70% of the studies get placed every year. The average salary package offered was 3 LPA - 5 LPA. Production and quality department roles are offered. More than 50% of the students get their internships.
content.Infrastructure: There are all digital classrooms with good ventilation. Labs are full equipped with equipment and chemicals. The library is fullied occupied with offline and online authorised books. Medicinal garden is also present. The hostel is available with good infrastructure. Medical facilities are also available. Sports ground is also available.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmacology - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Everything in our college is good.

content.Placements: Our college offers good courses and placements. The packages offered vary from branch to branch. Every department has good faculty members. Good companies come here and offer placement opportunities. Every student got an internship in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure. Our HODs and associates and assistant faculty are good. The hostel food is good. The warden is good and interactive with students. Games are conducted every month.
content.Faculty: The teachers are good and help us prepare for exams. They provide notes and important questions. They also organise industrial visits in all semesters. Exams are easy, and we can score good percentage.

admission_overview.college_name: Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor admission is entirelyentrance-based.Additionally, the college also provides admission based on management quota.Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor, offersBPharma, MPharma, and PharmDat the UG, PG, and PhD levels, respectively. Admission to all the courses isopen. To get admission, applicants are required to fill out the eligibility criteria before applying for admission. The college accepts various exams, such asAP EAMCET, AP PGECET,andGPAT,for admission to UG, PG, and PhD courses.

To be eligible for admission to any courses at Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor, it is mandatory to apply and appear for the accepted entrance exam. Additionally, applicants are required to visit the college website to apply for admission. Go through the below article for more detailed information about Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor admission process,along with course-wise eligibility and selection criteria:

Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor admission process 2025 is completely online. To get admission, applicants must apply via the college's official website for the desired courses. Admission to all the courses is entrance-based. Further, the college offers admission to applicants based on three types of quotas such as:
The selection process and eligibility and selection criteria for Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor courses are given below:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
Pass Class 10 and Class 12 with Physics& Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with Mathematics or Biology with 50% aggregate
BPharma with 50% aggregate
AP EAMCET,GPAT
BPharma with 50% aggregate
GPAT,AP PGECET

Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor admission process includes multiple steps that must be followed by the applicants for admission. The admission process starts with filling out the application form, appearing in the entrance exam accepted by the college, along with the counselling round and final seat confirmation. Applicants looking for admission to any UG, PG and PhD courses are required to appear for the entrance exam accepted by the college. Given below are step-by-step Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor admission process 2025:
Step 1: Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor Application Process

Applicants looking for admission to any courses at the college are required to fill out the application form online by visiting the official website of the college. Before applying for admission, applicants must check the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria set by the college for admission.
Step 2: Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor Selection Round

Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor offers entrance-based admission to all the courses. The eligibility criteria set by the college is to passClass 12for admission to the BPharma course. Further, for admission to MPharma and Pharma D courses, applicants are required to pass BPharma with 50% aggregate from a recognised board. Additionally, applicants must fulfil the selection criteria, i.e., apply and appear for AP EAMCET, GPAT, and AP PGECET for admission toBPharma, PharmaD and MPharma, respectively. The college releases the merit list based on their scores in entrance exams and counselling. Additionaly, the college offers direct admission to the applicants who belong to any quota offered by the college.
Step 3: Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor Final Seat Confirmation

Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor, releases a merit list of the selected applicants for all courses for the final seat allotment. Additionaly for candidates who belong to the management quota get direct admission. After getting shortlisted for the merit list or getting admission based on the management quota, applicants are required to makeSri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy, Chittoor feepayment within the given deadline to grab the seats.

reviews.review_heading: Complete review of SVCOP.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of hostel is nice as it is an international hostel of students from different countries. Food is nice but only problem is water facilities are bad. There is central library and it contains only a narrow range of text books and limited journals.

reviews.review_heading: Waste of college for skills learning and syllabus teaching.
reviews.review_text: In this college, infrastructure is good but not excellent. In college, infrastructure is nice. But the hostel has bad infrastructure and no proper bathroom facilities. Sometimes bathroom lights are also not proper. But outside of the hostel garden is very peaceful.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Venkateswara College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: Course is really awesome. The flow of the course made it easy to study and co-relate things. It also helps me to better understand. Hostel is okay but the main problem is water even we do not get drinking water sometimes. Food is nice and they maintain proper hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: It is a top pharmacy college.
reviews.review_text: There are all digital classrooms with good ventilation. Labs are full equipped with equipment and chemicals. The library is fullied occupied with offline and online authorised books. Medicinal garden is also present. The hostel is available with good infrastructure. Medical facilities are also available. Sports ground is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Everything in our college is good.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. Our HODs and associates and assistant faculty are good. The hostel food is good. The warden is good and interactive with students. Games are conducted every month.

reviews.review_heading: Best pharmacy college with good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Digital classrooms, well-equipped laboratory with drug samples. Wi-Fi is available. Library is fully equipped with the latest edition books and e books are also available. Hostel also present with quality and sports also conducted. Hospital is also present at walking distance.

reviews.review_heading: Emerging pharmacy college.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are digitally occupied with projectors. Library is fully occupied with the latest edition books and e books are also available. Labs are fully equipped with machines. Hostel is also available with good quality food. Hospital is also in walkable distance. Sports are also conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Venkateswara College Of Pharmacy,Chittoor.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are digital here. Labs are fully filled with equipment and raw materials. The library is also available on the campus. The library is filled with books, and e-books are available here. Wi-Fi connectivity is also available. The hostel provides quality food. The hospital is near to the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is emerging as a good pharmacy college.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms are digital and well-being and there is a well-occupied library with different edition books and E-library also. Laboratories are well occupied with equipment and partially occupied with chemicals or reagents. A medicinal garden is also present and a playground is there.

reviews.review_heading: The hostel infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The college has enough resources for the education of students. The college doesn't have Wi-Fi, but the library is open for 8 hours during college hours. The classrooms and laboratories are up to date. The hostel is much proper with all facilities such as gym, hospital, sports ground and canteen. The hostel provides good food and water supply.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college, because of its facilities and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the hostel is not provided for the pharmacy department, a common hostel or PG is there which is not suitable for all girls. The Wi-Fi facility is also not available in this college. The library is not up-to-date with various books. The facilities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Students who want to pursue Pharma.D can choose some good top-ranking colleges or universities.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure isn't that good. Our library is good. The hostel is far better, and it provides good food, Wi-Fi and other facilities. The hostel also has a basketball court and badminton court. Mess food is good as compared to other colleges hostel mess.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Venkateswara College Of Pharmacy,Chittoor.
reviews.review_text: There is a good library, classrooms and labs, which are certified by AICTE. Laboratories are well-equipped, and we are guided well as well. The hostel is also well-equipped, and the food served is good. You can expect varieties of food items, and there is an attached canteen with the hostel where we can get all essentials. Hostel wardens are supportive and take care of students well. Our college's RVS Hospital is situated nearby, and even Chittoor government hospital is available nearby. An ambu...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities and infrastructure are very good like Wi-Fi facilities, library, hostel, canteen and labs. Food quality is very good, and the medical facilities are also good. Sports facilities are available in our hostel like basketball, cricket, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are very good. I suggest others to study and enjoy college life here.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are excellent. The hostel was very good, and the Wi-Fi connection is also available. They provide 24 hours of drinking water, and bathrooms are also very good. content.Placements: There is nothing like placements in dental college. But the college gives a fair amount of selection of students in the NEET PG exam for MS colleges, for passing out batch. It is also an MS college.
content.Infrastructure: Everything on the campus is average. The complete university complies with five colleges all together - dental college, MBA college, Pharmacy college, hotel management, and engineering college.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are very good. Their way of teaching helps a lot in both practicals and theoretically. They encourage us for public speaking by giving us presentations from time to time which helps in performing various conferences.

Water and other needed sources are not provided by the college management and the college does not provide any facilities.

placements.overview: A total of 13 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 2 year PG degree at G.H.G. Khalsa College and 13 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 13 students 4 were placed with median salary of INR 275000 A total of 60 students were admitted in year 2017-18 for 4 year UG degree at G.H.G. Khalsa College and 54 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 54 students 22 were placed with median salary of INR 235000 and 5 students opted for higher studies.For the batch ending 2020-21, the placement record for 2 year PG course at G.H.G. Khalsa College was 3.3%.The median package offered for the students during this session was INR 275000 Lakh. G.H.G. Khalsa College has a placement record of 2.8% for 4 year UG course.The median package offered for the batch ending 2020-21 at G.H.G. Khalsa College was INR 235000 Lakh.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, G.H.G. Khalsa College offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. College offers B.Sc., BCA and B.Com courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.Sc., M.Com and M.Pharma. The G.H.G. Khalsa College course fee ranges between INR 23,000 to 2,40,000.

faqs.answer: Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.
faqs.question: Q: What is the Scope of Humanities and Social Science courses?

faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.

hostel_campus.college_name: G.H.G. Khalsa College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure, education, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was average. All facilities were available in this college. Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratory was better. Classrooms were well-maintained. There was a decent library in this college. The food quality was very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of G.H.G. Khalsa College.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities in this college for students like free Wi-Fi for social knowledge, labs for practical knowledge, etc. Classrooms are also big and properly ventilated. The library is also available for students to enhance their knowledge. The quality of the hostel is good. The food served in the mess is also good. Medical facilities are also good, and it's a great institution for sports.

reviews.review_heading: It has good teachers, green campus with all types of sports ground, and good placements.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the hostel rooms are good, and Wi-Fi is also available. It has clean classrooms with CCTV. The central library is available for everyone. The infrastructure is good, and all the laboratories and classrooms are well-equipped with the necessary facilities. There is Wi-Fi availability for everyone. The campus is clean and the food served in the cafeteria is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Anyone who is interested in this college should come and join it.
reviews.review_text: They are provided good facilities and infrastructure. Labs and classrooms are very good. They provide a good library. All books are available for the course. The hostel food is well prepared. Sports are very important. Game facilities are very good, and cricket is played in the college.

reviews.review_heading: This college has new technology with better infrastructure and good sports facilities.
reviews.review_text: Projectors are available in all classrooms for better understanding. All the facilities including Wi-Fi, science labs, library, and music rooms are good and enjoyable. There is a canteen with all the food items. For girls, food compartment is available. There is army facility also.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with academics, and our college has good value for money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was good. All classrooms were spacious. Restrooms were clean. Our college has a huge library, a sports ground, and a canteen. The food served in the canteen was good. Medical facilities were good. The hostel rooms were well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Not fully but partially satisfied and I'll recommend all of you to take admission.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is better than expected and you can go through all the rooms, labs, libraries, grounds, etc. All the places are neat and clean and you can also get a good opportunity to join NCC. The food facilities are 5 out of 5. The canteen is there from where you can buy some food for you and hostel charges are also not so expensive.
